Package tellui.component

Class CheckBox

java.lang.Object
tellui.core.base.View
tellui.core.base.SpatialView
tellui.core.base.ContentView
tellui.core.base.Component
tellui.core.AbstractButton
tellui.component.CheckBox
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public final class CheckBox extends AbstractButton
A clickable CheckBox component that can be toggled between checked and unchecked states.

Supports multiple visual styles for the check mark (MARK, DOT, RECT) and notifies registered listeners whenever the state changes (via setChecked(boolean) or toggle()).

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • CheckBox

      public CheckBox(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Constructs a CheckBox with the specified bounds.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the CheckBox
      y - the y-coordinate of the CheckBox
      w - the width of the CheckBox
      h - the height of the CheckBox

    • CheckBox

      public CheckBox()
      Constructs a CheckBox with default size, centered on the screen.

  • Method Details

    • getStyle

      public CheckBox.Style getStyle()
      Returns the current visual style of the check mark.
      Returns:
      the current style (MARK, DOT, or RECT)

    • setStyle

      public void setStyle(CheckBox.Style style)
      Sets the visual style of the check mark.
      Parameters:
      style - the new style (must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if style is null

    • getMarkColor

      public AbstractColor getMarkColor()
      Returns the color used for the check mark.
      Returns:
      the mark color

    • setMarkColor

      public void setMarkColor(AbstractColor markColor)
      Sets the color of the check mark.
      Parameters:
      markColor - the new mark color (must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if markColor is null

    • addOnCheckedListener

      public void addOnCheckedListener(Listener listener)
      Adds a listener that is called whenever the checked state changes (via setChecked(boolean) or toggle()).
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to add
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null
      DuplicateItemException - if the listener has already been added

    • removeOnCheckedListener

      public void removeOnCheckedListener(Listener listener)
      Removes a previously added checked-state listener.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to remove
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null
      NoSuchElementException - if the listener was not found

    • isChecked

      public boolean isChecked()
      Returns the current checked state.
      Returns:
      true if checked, false otherwise

    • setChecked

      public void setChecked(boolean checked)
      Sets the checked state. No event is fired if the new state equals the current one.
      Parameters:
      checked - the new checked state

    • toggle

      public void toggle()
      Toggles the checked state (switches it to the opposite value).
